name: enhance_mcp_explorer
description: Enhance the claude-code mcp-server (codemaster explorer) to expose tools/resources for the new TaskMaster system (list TASKs, get definition, suggest podman MCP, execute spec). Make the new connectors and /task useful inside the Super Grok source explorer MCP itself.

steps.action: add tools: list_available_tasks, get_task_definition, execute_task_spec, list_podman_mcps
add resources for TASK registry and podman configs
rebuild and test MCP (stdio or http)
